title: symphyotrichum undulatum
intro: Symphyotrichum undulatum, also known as the wavy-leaved aster, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum undulatum include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
